name: Legends' Battlegrounds
short_description: There are many diverse battle environments, a wealth of weapons and skills, and a variety of movement options to explore. Join the Legends' BattleGround and become your own legend!
detailed_description: In this action battle royale game, you'll search for weapons and skills in different environments such as castles, cathedrals, grasslands, forests, arenas, temples, towns, and more. Choose from swords, katanas, hammers, bows and arrows, staffs, or go bare-handed. With a wide variety of weapons and skills to choose from, you can ride horses or fly through the vast expanse of the world. Come to the Legends' BattleGrounds and become your own legend!
about_the_game: In this action battle royale game, you'll search for weapons and skills in different environments such as castles, cathedrals, grasslands, forests, arenas, temples, towns, and more. Choose from swords, katanas, hammers, bows and arrows, staffs, or go bare-handed. With a wide variety of weapons and skills to choose from, you can ride horses or fly through the vast expanse of the world. Come to the Legends' BattleGrounds and become your own legend!
supported_languages: Simplified Chinese, English, French, Italian, German, Spanish - Spain, Arabic, Japanese, Korean, Polish, Portuguese - Brazil, Portuguese - Portugal, Russian, Spanish - Latin America, Turkish
